segments.lat: quid fieri placeret scripsi ad Pomponium serius quam oportuit. Cum eo si locuta eris, intelleges quid fieri velim ; apertius scribi, quoniam ad illum scripseram, necesse non fuit. de ea re et de ceteris rebus quam primum velim nobis litteras mittas. valetudinem tuam cura diligenter. vale . vii Idus Quintilis.
segments.eng: What I wanted done I wrote to Pomponius --- later than I should have. When you have spoken with him you will understand what I want done; to write of it more openly was not necessary, since I had already written to him. About this matter and the rest, I should like you to send us letters as soon as possible. Take careful care of your health. Farewell. The seventh day before the Ides of Quintilis.
